# `polars math bitwise-leading-zeros` for [dataframe](/commands/categories/dataframe.md)

<div class='command-title'>Compute the number of leading unset bits for each element in an integer column expression.</div>

## Signature

```> polars math bitwise-leading-zeros {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input             | output            |
| ----------------- | ----------------- |
| polars_expression | polars_expression |
| polars_selector   | polars_expression |
## Examples

Count the number of leading unset bits for each element in an integer column
```nu
> [[n]; [0] [1] [255]] |
    polars into-df |
    polars select (polars col n | polars math bitwise-leading-zeros) |
    polars collect
╭───┬────╮
│ # │ n  │
├───┼────┤
│ 0 │ 64 │
│ 1 │ 63 │
│ 2 │ 56 │
╰───┴────╯

```
